title: Cerberu
description: Cerberu is a Minecraft mod that allows your helmet's enchantment to heal nearby pets when you attack creatures and transfer damage from pets to you based on your health.
body:
[Starks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/starks) mod is now updated for Minecraft 1.20.1!    
## Cerberus  

**Cerberus** is a unique Minecraft Forge mod that adds a special enchantment to your helmet. When players wear a helmet with this enchantment, any damage they deal to creatures will heal their nearby pets. Additionally, when the pets take damage, if the player's health is above a certain percentage, the player will take the damage instead.  

### Main Features:  
- **Enchantment Name**: Cerberus  
- **Enchantment Effect**:   
  - Attacking creatures heals nearby pets.  
  - Players take damage instead of their pets if the player's health is above a specified percentage.  

### Configuration Options:  
  - Customize tradeability, curse status, and treasure rarity.  
  - Set enchantment rarity and whether it can be found in loot or on books.  
  - Adjust healing behavior, damage threshold, and excluded damage sources.
